name: Fallout RPG
description:
Fallout, created by Tim Cain, is a unique perspective on the quote "End of the World", as a result of heavy nuclear war that devastated the entire world. On October 23, 2077, total atomic annihilation wiped out almost all life on Earth — Almost. This RP will take place within any of the locations on Earth affected by the nuclear fallout — Whether this be from the original games or an entirely new area.
Please also note that I do not make bots often, and am still learning how to properly set them up. I do try my hardest making these bots as close to perfect as possible. <3
creator: lockjaw
